overall.description: A maritime simulation showing a first-person view from a ship's bridge navigating through stormy seas at night. The scene features operational navigation displays including radar and chart plotters, with the vessel's bow cutting through choppy waters under dark, lightning-lit skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge with navigation consoles overlooking the bow

events.description: lightning flashes in the distance on the right side, briefly illuminating the storm clouds

agents.ego_description: piloting the vessel from the bridge, maintaining steady course through rough seas while monitoring navigation displays

entered.detail: navigation monitor showing chart plotter with coastal map and vessel position
circular radar display with rotating sweep arm showing surrounding contacts
blue data screen showing navigation parameters and system status
metal deck of the ship's bow with railings and anchor equipment
choppy dark water with visible wave patterns extending to horizon

segments.scene_description: View from inside a ship's bridge looking forward over the bow into stormy night seas. Three navigation displays are visible overhead showing charts, radar, and data. The vessel moves steadily through choppy waters while a lightning flash briefly illuminates the distant clouds on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge with navigation consoles overlooking the bow

agents.ego_description: continuing to pilot the vessel through the storm, maintaining course as the ship progresses through the rough seas

segments.scene_description: The vessel continues its steady passage through the stormy night. The navigation displays remain active with the radar continuously sweeping, while the bow cuts through the dark choppy waters. The scene remains consistent with no significant changes in the environment or vessel operation.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a ship's bridge as it navigates through a relentless nocturnal storm. It begins with a view looking forward over the bow into choppy, dark waters, while three overhead navigation displays show active charts, radar, and vessel data. As the ship maintains its steady course, a sudden flash of lightning briefly illuminates the distant clouds to the right, cutting through the gloom. The scene then persists in this atmospheric tension, with the radar continuously sweeping across the displays while the bow continues to slice through the turbulent sea. Finally, the camera remains fixed on the horizon, capturing the consistent rhythm of the vessel's passage through the stormy night.
